summary: Tested iteration 217 - Refactored Inbox and Ticket Reply experience (Option A). Backend: 7/7 tests PASS for POST /api/member/tickets/:ticketId/reply endpoint. Frontend: Split view working, TicketThread renders directly without iframe, Apple-clear reply UX implemented with visible Send button, Enter to send, optimistic UI.

integration_issues.flow: Some notification rows reference non-existent tickets
integration_issues.issue: Clicking certain notifications (TKT-SHOP-* format) returns 'Ticket not found' - these tickets may not exist in mira_tickets or service_desk collections

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationsInbox.jsx correctly renders TicketThread directly without iframe (Option A implemented)
TicketThread.jsx supports mode='split' prop and omits GlobalNav in split mode
Reply composer has visible Send button with data-testid='send-reply-btn'
Enter to send implemented in handleKeyDown function, Shift+Enter for newline
Optimistic UI shows 'Sending...' with spinner, 'Not sent. Tap to retry.' on failure
Backend POST /api/member/tickets/:ticketId/reply writes to service_desk_tickets FIRST, then syncs to mira_tickets
Admin notification created for concierge on member reply
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 217 completed. POST /api/member/tickets/:ticketId/reply endpoint at lines 14169-14263 in server.py. NotificationsInbox.jsx renders TicketThread directly in split mode (Option A - no iframe). TicketThread.jsx has optimistic UI with pendingMessages state. Test ticket TCK-2026-000040 used for testing.
